commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1a7b9d201d9b5665da47ad8bac85a07172035851)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds gated menu-open performance instrumentation, coalesces open-menu rebuilds during provider refresh bursts, scopes refresh actions and indicators, reuses unchanged menu cards, and adds regression tests/docs.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows Cmd-R follows StatusItemMenu.performKeyEquivalent -> performPersistentRefreshAction() -> refreshNow(), bypassing the PR's new menu-scoped refreshMenuProviderNow(in:) path. I did not run live provider probes because repository policy warns against validation that can trigger Keychain prompts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer or contributor action is needed because the PR is conflicting, lacks inspectable live proof, and has a real shortcut-path bug; this is not a safe automated repair lane while proof is missing.

target.title: perf(menu): fix open-menu beachball/stutter on multi-provider setups
target.body:
# PR: perf/menu-open-delay

## Problem

Opening the CodexBar menu could stutter or beachball when provider refreshes completed in a burst. The visible symptom was menu click -> open delay and repeated visual churn while the vibrant menu was already being tracked.

## Root cause & measurement

The app-side main thread was not the bottleneck. The measured menu path showed the main thread idle with 0 hangs; the expensive work was WindowServer-side compositing of the vibrant menu after repeated open-menu rebuilds.

The pathological case was provider refresh burst behavior: every per-provider refresh completion could rebuild the open menu, causing WindowServer to re-composite the same vibrant menu repeatedly. With all providers refreshing, measurement showed roughly 82 rebuilds per session.

Diagnosis reference: `docs/perf-menu-open-refactor-plan-2026-06-16.md`

## Changes

Commits and changed files from `git log -p a4f278d9..perf/menu-open-delay`:

- `5ca07d12` `perf(menu): add gated menu-open timing instrumentation + diagnosis notes`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Menu.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuCardItems.swift`
  - `docs/perf-menu-open-delay-2026-06-15.md`
  - Added opt-in `menuPerfLogging` timing around `menuWillOpen`, `populateMenu`, data readiness, hosting init, and height lookup.

- `8875b833` `test(menu): performClick-based menu-open autotest harness (gated)`
  - `.gitignore`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/MenuPerfAutotest.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Shutdown.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift`
  - Added gated automated menu-open harness and shutdown cleanup for the test task.

- `0c149583` `wip(menu-perf): GUI-window render autotest harness (displayLink not yet firing)`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/MenuPerfGuiRenderAutotest.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift`
  - Added GUI-window render autotest scaffolding for compositor investigation.

- `e22fe240` `test(menu): [ui-load] per-card layout timing in MenuCardItemHostingView`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuCardItems.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuPresentation.swift`
  - Added per-card layout timing to isolate card measurement and presentation cost.

- `2252b5e6` `perf(menu): opt-in toggle to disable card vibrancy (A/B prescription)`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuPresentation.swift`
  - Added an opt-in A/B switch to test card vibrancy as a compositing contributor.

- `e65fdb28` `test(menu): [open-menu] instrumentation for post-open rebuild cost`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuTracking.swift`
  - Added instrumentation around post-open rebuild cost while menus are tracking.

- `efd71217` `perf(menu): incremental open-menu rebuild - reuse unchanged cards`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Menu.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuCardItems.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuPresentation.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift`
  - Added card reuse and height fingerprint plumbing so unchanged menu card views can be reused.

- `7e039151` `perf(menu): fix open-menu beachball/stutter - coalesce during-tracking rebuilds + scoped refresh + indicator`
  - `.gitignore`
  - `Scripts/capture-menu-perf.sh`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/MenuPerfHangMonitor.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Actions.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Menu.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuPresentation.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuRefreshScheduling.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuTracking.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+PersistentMenuActions.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore+Accessors.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore.swift`
  - `Tests/CodexBarTests/StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests.swift`
  - `Tests/CodexBarTests/StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests.swift`
  - `docs/perf-menu-open-refactor-plan-2026-06-16.md`
  - Added rebuild coalescing during menu tracking, scoped Refresh behavior, row-level refresh indication, and gated `MenuPerfHangMonitor` instrumentation.

- `09427107` `fix(menu): drop refresh-row spinner animation - it re-composited the vibrant menu (beachball)`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuPresentation.swift`
  - Removed the animated refresh-row spinner that was forcing repeated vibrant menu recomposition.

- `1b6f6d75` `perf(menu): coalesce open-menu rebuilds across a whole refresh burst (1 rebuild, not per-provider)`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuTracking.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Shutdown.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift`
  - `Tests/CodexBarTests/StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests.swift`
  - Coalesced a full refresh burst into one open-menu rebuild instead of rebuilding once per provider completion.

- `d6da5327` `perf(menu): defer data/refresh-driven open-menu rebuilds during a refresh burst (switches stay immediate)`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuTracking.swift`
  - Deferred data/refresh-driven rebuilds while refresh bursts are active while keeping direct provider switches immediate.

- `abc48272` `fix(menu): address pre-PR review findings (stale card reuse, accountInfo observation, overview refresh, refresh ref-count)`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/MenuCardHeightFingerprint.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Actions.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+CodexStackedMenu.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+Menu.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MenuCardItems.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+PersistentMenuActions.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore+Accessors.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore+BackgroundRefresh.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore+Refresh.swift`
  - `Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore.swift`
  - `Tests/CodexBarTests/MenuCardHeightFingerprintTests.swift`
  - `Tests/CodexBarTests/StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests.swift`
  - `Tests/CodexBarTests/StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests.swift`
  - Fixed stale card reuse by separating render and height fingerprints, added accountInfo observation for async accountInfo I/O, preserved Overview refresh behavior, and made refresh tracking ref-counted.

## Testing

- `swift test`
  - 3414 tests passed.
  - 1 pre-existing MiniMax locale failure was observed and treated as expected for this branch.

Manual verification:

- Enable instrumentation:

```bash
defaults write com.steipete.codexbar menuPerfLogging -bool YES
```

- Relaunch the app from a fresh build.
- Trigger all-provider refresh bursts with the menu open.
- Confirm the open menu does not rebuild for every provider completion.
- Confirm provider switch interactions remain immediate.
- Confirm the Refresh row shows scoped in-flight state without an animated spinner.
- Confirm `[menu-perf]` / `MenuPerfHangMonitor` logs appear only when `menuPerfLogging` is enabled.
- Disable instrumentation:

```bash
defaults delete com.steipete.codexbar menuPerfLogging
```

## Safety notes

- All performance instrumentation is gated by the `menuPerfLogging` flag.
- With `menuPerfLogging` off, instrumentation has zero runtime logging/signpost cost.
- The optimization is scoped to open-menu rebuild scheduling, refresh row presentation, card reuse correctness, and async accountInfo observation.
- No logic changes were made to non-performance paths.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
